title: Epic Adventure
description: A medieval/fantasy like adventure pack filled with some of the best optimization mods. Even works for mid-low end computers with low settings.
body:
Short story: In a world full of animals and monsters, you the player has to be on his guard. You will explore the beatiful terrain and loot the new structures. Alone or together this modpack will make your day slightly better. 

The mod includes some origins mods.
